templates.name: General
templates.extraction_prompt: Provide a comprehensive analysis of the document including summary, key topics, and entities

templates.name: Legal
templates.extraction_prompt:
Analyze Turkish legal document and extract:

Common Fields:
- title: Full legal document name
- summary: Brief 2-3 sentence overview of the law's purpose
- excerpt: First paragraph or key article text
- author: Legislative body (TBMM, Cumhurbaşkanlığı, etc)
- source: Resmi Gazete number and date
- tableOfContents: List of chapter/section names (Birinci Kısım, İkinci Kısım, etc)
- type: 'legal'
- category: Document type (Kanun, Tüzük, Yönetmelik, etc)
- relatedTopics: Related legal areas (Vergi, Ticaret, Ceza, etc)

Legal Specific Fields:
- kanunNo: Law number (e.g., '213 Sayılı Vergi Usul Kanunu')
- maddeler: Object with article numbers as keys and full article text as values {"Madde 1": "text", "Madde 2": "text"}
- yürürlükTarihi: Effective date
- mevzuatTuru: Type (Kanun/Tüzük/Yönetmelik/KHK)
- maddeSayisi: Total article count
- degisiklikler: List of amendments with dates
- yaptirimlar: Sanctions and penalties described
- yetkiliKurum: Responsible authority

Provide complete, structured JSON with all fields.

templates.name: Turkish Tax Law (Vergi Hukuku)
templates.description: Turkish tax legislation - laws, regulations, circulars, court decisions
templates.extraction_prompt:
Analyze Turkish tax law document. Extract ALL fields with detailed information:

# DOCUMENT IDENTIFICATION
- title: Full official document name
- summary: 3-4 sentence overview explaining the law's main purpose and scope
- excerpt: First 2-3 paragraphs or key provisions
- type: Always 'legal'
- category: Always 'Vergi Hukuku'
- subCategory: One of [Kanun, Genel Tebliğ, Sirküler, Özelge, Kararname, Yönetmelik, Genelge, Danıştay Kararı, E-Kitap]
- documentType: Specific type (e.g., 'Gelir Vergisi Kanunu', 'KDV Genel Tebliği')

# LEGAL METADATA
- mevzuatNo: Law/regulation number (e.g., '193', '3065', '5520')
- mevzuatAdi: Full official name (e.g., '193 Sayılı Gelir Vergisi Kanunu')
- mevzuatTuru: Type [Kanun, Tebliğ, Sirküler, Yönetmelik, Kararname, Genelge]
- bagliKanun: Parent law name if this is a regulation/circular
- bagliKanunNo: Parent law number

# OFFICIAL PUBLICATION
- resmiGazete: {sayi: 'number', tarih: 'date', mukerrer: boolean}
- yururlukTarihi: Effective date (ISO format)
- yayimTarihi: Publication date (ISO format)

# STRUCTURE
- maddeSayisi: Total number of articles (integer)
- maddeler: Structured object with ALL articles. Each article MUST have: {"Madde 1": {baslik: "Article title", metin: "Full article text", bentler: ["a) First sub-item", "b) Second sub-item"], fikralar: ["(1) First paragraph", "(2) Second paragraph"], atiflar: ["213 sayılı VUK Madde 37", "KDV Kanunu Madde 17"], degisiklik: "7338 sayılı Kanun ile değişik"}, ...}
- kisimlar: Array of part names ["Birinci Kısım: Genel Hükümler", ...]
- bolumler: Array of chapter names
- fasiller: Array of section names if exists
- tableOfContents: Hierarchical structure of document

# RELATIONSHIPS
- ilgiliKanunlar: Related law numbers and names [{no: '213', ad: 'VUK'}, ...]
- ilgiliTebligler: Related general communiqués
- ilgiliSirkulerler: Related circulars
- degisiklikler: Amendments [{kanunNo: '7338', tarih: '2021-10-26', maddeler: ['1', '5']}, ...]
- yururluktenKaldirilanlar: Repealed provisions

# TAX SPECIFIC
- vergiTurleri: Tax types covered ["Gelir Vergisi", "KDV", ...]
- mukellefTipleri: Taxpayer types ["Gerçek Kişi", "Tüzel Kişi", "Dar Mükellef"]
- istisnalar: Exemptions with article references
- muafiyetler: Tax immunities
- indirimler: Deductions allowed

# RATES & DEADLINES
- oranlar: Tax rates {"Gelir Vergisi": [{dilim: "0-70000", oran: "15%"}, ...], "KDV": ["1%", "10%", "20%"]}
- matrahlar: Tax bases described
- beyanSureleri: Declaration deadlines {"yillik": "Mart sonu", "aylık": "26'sı"}
- odemeSureleri: Payment deadlines
- zamanasimiSureleri: Statute of limitations

# SANCTIONS
- yaptirimlar: General sanctions described
- cezalar: Specific penalties {"usulsuzluk": "amount/description", "hileli": "3 kat"}
- gecikmeZammi: Late payment interest rates
- gecikmeFaizi: Default interest provisions

# AUTHORITY
- yetkiliKurum: Main authority (e.g., "Hazine ve Maliye Bakanlığı")
- ilgiliBirimler: Related departments ["Gelir İdaresi Başkanlığı", ...]
- uygulamaBirimleri: Implementation units

# SUPPLEMENTARY
- ornekler: Practical examples provided in document
- formlar: Required forms mentioned
- ekler: Appendices list
- dipnotlar: Important footnotes
- atiflar: References to other laws/articles

# GENERAL
- keywords: Extract 10-15 key terms
- relatedTopics: Related subjects ["Vergi İncelemesi", "Transfer Fiyatlandırması"]
- source: Official source ("Resmi Gazete", publisher, etc.)
- author: Author/issuing authority

# FOR E-BOOKS ONLY
- yazar: Book author(s)
- yayinevi: Publisher
- basimYili: Publication year
- isbn: ISBN if available
- sayfaSayisi: Total pages

IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Extract COMPLETE article texts in 'maddeler' field
2. For numeric fields like mevzuatNo, extract only the number (e.g., '193' not '193 Sayılı')
3. Use null for non-applicable fields
4. Dates in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)
5. Preserve exact legal terminology
6. Include ALL amendments and changes
7. Extract complete tax rates and deadlines

Provide comprehensive, structured JSON with all applicable fields.

templates.name: Novel / E-Book
templates.description: Books, novels, stories - characters, plot, narrative
templates.extraction_prompt:
Analyze book/novel/ebook and extract:

Common Fields:
- title: Book title
- summary: 3-4 sentence plot summary without spoilers
- excerpt: Opening paragraph or memorable quote from the book
- author: Author name(s)
- source: Publisher and publication info
- tableOfContents: Chapter names/titles if available
- type: 'book' or 'novel' or 'ebook'
- category: Genre (Roman, Hikaye, Deneme, Tarih, Bilim, etc)
- relatedTopics: Themes and topics (Aşk, Macera, Tarih, Bilim, Felsefe, etc)

Book Specific Fields:
- mainCharacters: List of main character names with brief descriptions
- narrativeStyle: First person/Third person/Multiple perspectives, etc
- genre: Detailed genre (Polisiye Roman, Tarih Kurgu, Bilim Kurgu, etc)
- plotThemes: Major themes explored (Love, War, Identity, Justice, etc)
- setting: Time period and locations
- publisher: Publishing house
- publicationDate: Year published
- isbn: ISBN number if available
- language: Original language
- pageCount: Number of pages
- targetAudience: (Yetişkin, Genç, Çocuk, etc)

Provide complete, structured JSON with all fields.

templates.name: Research
templates.extraction_prompt: Extract research paper details including authors, abstract, methodology, research domain, key findings, citations, and conclusions

templates.name: Invoice
templates.extraction_prompt: Extract invoice details including invoice number, vendor information, dates, amounts, and line items

templates.name: Contract
templates.extraction_prompt: Extract contract details including parties, dates, obligations, and key legal terms

templates.name: Finance
templates.extraction_prompt: Extract financial metrics including revenue, profit, assets, liabilities, and cash flow

templates.name: Web Page
templates.extraction_prompt: Extract web page metadata including title, summary, main topics, entities, author, publish date, and content type (article/blog/news/etc)

templates.name: Musical / Sheet Music
templates.description: Music notation, lyrics, chords, musical metadata
templates.extraction_prompt:
Analyze sheet music / musical score and extract:

Common Fields:
- title: Song/composition title
- summary: Brief description of the piece (style, mood, context)
- excerpt: First few lines of lyrics or musical description
- author: Composer name (besteci)
- source: Publisher, collection, or origin
- tableOfContents: Movement names or song sections (Intro, Verse, Chorus, Bridge, etc)
- type: 'sheet_music' or 'musical_score'
- category: Music genre (Klasik Türk Müziği, Pop, Rock, Türkü, etc)
- relatedTopics: Musical themes, emotions, or subjects (Aşk, Hüzün, Neşe, Vatan, etc)

Musical Specific Fields:
- composer: Composer/Besteci name
- lyricist: Lyricist/Güfteci name (if different from composer)
- genre: Detailed genre (Türk Sanat Müziği, Arabesk, Pop, Rock, Türkü, etc)
- key: Musical key (C Major, D Minor, etc) - leave empty for Turkish classical
- timeSignature: Time signature (4/4, 3/4, 6/8, etc)
- tempo: Tempo marking (Andante, Allegro, 120 BPM, etc)
- lyrics: COMPLETE lyrics text with line breaks preserved, including all verses and chorus
- chords: Chord progression if available (C-G-Am-F, etc)
- musicalNotation: Description of notation type (Western, Turkish, tabs, etc)
- language: Language of lyrics (Turkish, English, etc)
- arranger: Arranger name if applicable
- publisher: Publishing company
- copyright: Copyright info
- difficulty: Performance difficulty (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced)
- instruments: List of instruments (Piano, Guitar, Bağlama, Ney, etc)
- makam: Makam name for Turkish classical music (Hüseyni, Hicaz, Rast, Uşşak, etc)
- usul: Usul/rhythm pattern for Turkish music (Sofyan, Düyek, Aksak, etc)
- form: Musical form (Şarkı, Türkü, Beste, Semai, Longa, etc)
- duration: Duration in minutes
- yearComposed: Year composed

IMPORTANT: Extract lyrics COMPLETELY with all verses, preserving line breaks. For Turkish classical music, always extract makam and usul. Provide complete, structured JSON with all fields.
